creator: asmodai@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

Paul Vixie confirmed that the patch I sent in to the BIND maintainers 
will make it in 8.2.3.  It is BIND-BUGS #932. 

And since I am going to keep on top of BIND this will be imported 
ASAP when it is released.  So no need to keep it open.
